name: Darzi Studio
description: Play Store screenshots for a tailor measurement studio. Charcoal and gold panels with a 3D fit model, Urdu measurement chips and outfit cards.

elements.name: 3D Mannequin
elements.imageAlt: Darzi Studio 3D fitting room — particle fit model with chaati scan ring

elements.name: Headline
elements.content:
Tap a point.
The tape shows up.

elements.name: Body
elements.content:
The camera glides to the point, a gold
band wraps where your tape would sit,
and you type the number.

elements.name: 3D Mannequin Waist
elements.imageAlt: Darzi Studio 3D fitting room — kamar scan ring close-up

elements.name: Body
elements.content:
Measurement sets, necklines and cuffs —
all drawn from Pakistani menswear.

elements.name: C1 Desc
elements.content:
The everyday order — collar to paincha,
side slits where they belong.

elements.name: C2 Desc
elements.content:
Worn over the kameez, measured over it —
the fit underneath still counts.

elements.name: C3 Desc
elements.content:
Suit season — coat length down to the
trouser opening, every call that counts.

elements.name: Body
elements.content:
A name, a mobile, twenty measurements,
three style calls and one voice note —
an order keeps it all together.

elements.name: Chalk Note
elements.content: press record while the customer is still talking

elements.name: Feature Row
elements.content: Voice notes · Style calls · Backdated orders

elements.name: C1 Quote
elements.content:
The mannequin remembers every size.
My diary finally stays closed.

elements.name: C2 Quote
elements.content:
I take the order while the customer
is still talking. Nothing gets lost.

elements.name: C3 Quote
elements.content:
No signal in the bazaar, no problem.
Every order is already in my pocket.

elements.name: Body
elements.content:
No account, no cloud, no connection lost.
Orders, measurements and voice notes
live on the phone.

elements.name: Stat 1 Label
elements.content:
measurement points,
each with its
real name

elements.name: Body
elements.content: Free, on the phone already in your pocket.
